EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IJSONObject2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides simplified DOM-like JSON serialization and de-serialization API.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2BBE5286-7C65-4FE4-9D51-C9F2A764DC10")]
public interface IJSONObject2 : IJSONObject

TryGetValueAsInt64(string, ref long)

Returns member value for a given name as LONGLONG. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsInt64(string Name, ref long Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value long

Returns

bool

TryGetValueAsUInt64(string, ref ulong)

Returns member value for a given name as ULONGLONG. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsUInt64(string Name, ref ulong Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value ulong

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsVariant(string, int, out object)

Returns member value for a given name as a VARIANT of the requested type. If member does not exist, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsVariant(string Name, int variantType, out object Value)

Parameters

Name string
variantType int
Value object

Returns

bool
